title: ibatia lanosa
intro: Ibatia lanosa, also known as the hairy ibatia, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Ibatia lanosa include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Ibatia lanosa is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to be used topically for its medicinal properties.
